questions.question: Paul says the grace of God has appeared bringing what to all people?
questions.feedback: The grace of God has appeared, bringing salvation for all people.

questions.question: What does grace train believers to renounce?
questions.feedback: Grace trains us to renounce ungodliness and worldly passions and live self-controlled lives.

questions.question: Paul says older women should be reverent in behavior and teach what is good.
questions.feedback: Older women should be reverent in behavior and teach what is good to younger women.

questions.question: Paul says we are waiting for the blessed hope — the appearing of the glory of our great God and _____.
questions.feedback: We await the blessed hope: the appearing of the glory of our great God and Savior Jesus Christ.

questions.question: Christ gave himself for us to redeem us from all _____ and purify for himself a people.
questions.feedback: Christ gave himself to redeem us from all lawlessness and purify a people for his own possession.
